message:
fix: improve triage cache isolation, grep highlighting, and load reading

Three independent fixes to improve reliability:

1. internal/bv/triage.go - Directory-aware triage cache
   - Added triageCacheDir to track which directory the cache is for
   - Cache now validates both TTL AND directory match before returning
   - Fixes bug where switching projects could return stale triage data
   - InvalidateTriageCache now also clears the cached directory

2. internal/cli/grep.go - Case-sensitivity aware highlighting
   - Added CaseInsensitive field to GrepResult struct for JSON output
   - highlightMatch() now respects the actual search case-sensitivity
   - Previously always used (?i) flag regardless of search options
   - Highlighting now matches what was actually found in search

3. internal/robot/health.go - Direct file read for load average
   - Replaced exec.Command("cat", "/proc/loadavg") with os.ReadFile()
   - Eliminates process spawn overhead for a simple file read
   - More idiomatic Go for reading procfs
   - Slightly faster health checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
